hotel_name: Sài Gòn Phú Quốc Resort (Saigon Phu Quoc Resort and Spa)

reviews.title: Worst stay
reviews.text:
Worst stay in my last 10 years of traveling. 
From reception to the room its highly disappointing. 
Reception staff was pathetic. 
Hotel staff was very rude.They don't listen to your complaint. They had excuse for everything. They asked for 100 us dollar at the time of check in per room,and at the time of check out they tried every means to adjust that 100 us dollars
Rooms are full of mosquitoes and 🐜 🐜 
Wash rooms are too small to use.

reviews.title: Was ok, not memorable, disappointed
reviews.positives: Need some major updates (shower, bathtub, wood floor, etc.)
reviews.negatives: No private beach as advertised

reviews.title: Too sad
reviews.text: For me, I really love SGPQ resort, because they stay in my memory , this trip I returned here, totally different, too bad , facility no repair,no maintenance, absolutely bad.no more private beach. Just between 5 years . So sad for me this trip . Really wish SGPQ resort can be better in the future . Love you all..

reviews.title: 2 days would be enough here 9 days was terrible
reviews.positives: This Hotel is located in the Town of Duong Dong central to all the local amenities. The beach is small but clean.
reviews.negatives:
This a very very tired hotel . The rooms are adequate and big enough but like the hotel need refreshing.
This is never a 8.5 hotel.
There are numerous hotels for the same money much better. The whole Hotel needs a good jetwash and paint.
Breakfast was 5/10. Swimming area delapidated. 
Pathways poor condition and hazadous

reviews.title: Not by any standards a 4 star hotel.Photos are not what resort looks like at all
reviews.text:
Hotel is at best a 2 star hotel.  breakfast was like being in a zoo with bus loads of tourists all fondling the food . We were horrified when we came for breakfast at 0900 one morning and there was food napkins and fruit  that had been just tossed onto the floor when finished  The staff made no effort to make a clean table for us and expected us to sit at a dirty table.
we left the next day and stayed at a real 4 star hotel

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: location, breakfast, beach and sand were all awesome. We were in a beachfront bungalow, so super quiet and great views
reviews.negatives: not nearly enough chairs and umbrellas on the beach and all need a refresh.  could also use an umbrella on the bungalow deck as the sun made it too intense and hot to sit there.

reviews.title: Not clean and Not nice attitude with dealing matters.
reviews.text:
Literally, bed, blanket and ground were so dirty.
The worst thing that I’ve experienced was “water problem”. 
When I try to take a shower and wash face water was stop flowing suddenly. Precisely, it was water pressure matter. We called Engineer two times and he (looked like very bothered) tried to fix it but he couldn’t.

After 1-2hours later, we changed the other room for free and we appreciated that anyway.
However, we were very disappointed of your attitude or skills when you deal problems.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Everything was great - nice rooms, good staff, good food, good location for getting around.
reviews.negatives: The beach isn’t great - it’s fine once you get in the water but the beach gets considerably nicer one hotel over. For our short stay it was fine but my family would have preferred a nicer part of the beach. More lounge chairs near the water would be nice too as the ones they have are often reserved staring before breakfast (often by people who didn’t show up for hours)

reviews.title: Reasonable location but run down feel.
reviews.text:
We went to stay over a long week end and the Hotel arranged pick up for us at the airport.

I was therefore very disappointed when there was no room available on arrival even though they new well in advance of my arrival.

We were kept waiting in a very hot reception area for 2 hours and having an 8 month old in tow was difficult.

It turns out that the Hotel only had a limited cleaning staff on duty and our room was the last to be cleaned.

Hotel itself has seen better days and the limited facilities were very old and in poor condition such as the bikes.

The one I was given had only 1 gear working and the chain kept slipping so much that I had to take it back.

When I complained I just got a shrug of the shoulders from the attendant.
reviews.positives: Quiet room with nice bed.

reviews.title: Good value for money
reviews.positives:
Beach was really close. Less than a minute from the room. Cost was sandy, nice.
Breakfast with fresh fruits, selection at least from 4 different kinds.
reviews.negatives:
Surroundings are a bit outdated, need attention, or renewal.  I was visiting the reception many times to reprogram the card to access the room, because suddenly it was no longer working.
The water wasn't clean, and there was sometimes a slight fish smell in the water, but it's not the hotel's fault.
The beach was cleaned up each morning, but it was more for impression than for quality. We often pulled plastic bags from the water, and once I found half of a glass bottle. If somebody stepped on this bottle, 100% of leg trauma is guaranteed, because sharp edges were pointing to the top. 

Staff weren't as friendly and helpful, as for example, in Indonesia. Another big problem not only for the hotel, but for all the island - issues with English. Many times we needed to use Google Translate to explain the situation. At least for hotel reception, it should be a must to speak in English.

reviews.title: Clean and comfortable hotel with nice room
reviews.text: Clean, comfortable and spacious room with private balcony. The resort had everything you need in terms of facilities although it is worth the scooter fir the fabulous bai soi beach which is the beach which a tropical island should have! The breakfast had plenty of choice and was lovely.the food and drink is incredibly expensive and I would reccomend the shop over the road for beers and snacks for a third of the price (I was truely shocked at the hotel price) there's is plenty of lovely restaurants and the night market for lovely food at a reasonable price. Overall happy with our stay, by no means a five star hotel but for the price it is comfortable and clean, it was quiet when we stayed which was brilliant
reviews.positives: Large and comfortable room

reviews.title: Great place to relax!
reviews.positives: Fantastic location. Bungalow with view onto the clean beach. Very large, comfortable bed. Great AC. Restaurant had views of the beach or some tables were on the beach. Great varied breakfast. Well maintained grounds. Friendly staff.
reviews.negatives: The wooden doors and patio fences needed replacing and water from the shower dripped all over the bathroom.

reviews.title: A Old Place with limited beach!
reviews.text:
This place seems to be built 40 years ago with the same style of my childhood.  Nothing impressive about this place. 
- There is no elevator for those physically limited
- No lobby area, but a hut to greet customers
- Too pricey for the amenities

I paid for the whole day/night but ended up leaving after staying there for a few hours.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Location near beach.. Spacious bungalow. Quitet at night. Good breakfast. Good restaurant.
Fast hot water in shower.

reviews.title: 1 or 2 star hotel at best
reviews.text: this is the worst '4 star' hotel i've come across in my travels.  there were stains on everything from walls to bathroom tiles to ceiling.  there were bugs in my room.  i was constant attacked by mosquitoes through the night.  i finally found some sleep by spraying the bed with bug spray to keep the mosquitoes away.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr MAI PING,
On behalf of management, thank you very much for your stay at Sai Gon Phu Quoc Resort & Spa from January 08 to 09, 2020.
Then, we do apologize for problems of the room that caused much inconvenience to you. Now, the room attendants have been retrained their skill. 
Thanks for your feedback, we appreciate guests’s comments which help us improve services better. Following the new age, our resort will have a renovation from April, 2020.
Unfortunately, we don’t have your good mark, we hope that we will have your coming back our resort to recognize our new changing in the future.

Best Regards,
Nguyen Ngoc Linh
Room Division Manager

reviews.title: The tow. Isn’t very exciting, but it was a nice place to relax in a bungalow on the beach.
reviews.positives: I loved the beachfront bungalow.
reviews.negatives: The food was very mediocre. Also, while wine is provided in the room (for a price), two of the bottles had turned because poor storage (they were both delivered hot).

reviews.title: Muito mau serviço ao cliente
reviews.text: Stayed  3 nights.On the day of our check out, we left, by mistake, a gold necklace in our room, by the bed table.Only at 3p.m. we notice that.The room was not occupied by that time, so, the only person that have been there, was certainly someone from the hotel staff.The necklace was not found.We went to the police, just to have a paper saying that it was missing (to present to our insurance company).We were not accusing anyone.We just wanted a police statement.We went to the police, a paper was handwritten and signed and it  was said to be ready at 3p.m.We asked the hotel to pick up the paper for us, since it was our last day of holidays in Vietnam .They said they will.Since then, i'm waiting for the paper, or copy, or photo.No paper, no photo, no necklace and no possibility of complaining to the insurance, because there isn't a police paper.And they even offered my a one night stay voucher for the ''inconvinience''.All i wanted was a police paper.They obviously didn't want to cooperate with us, the clients.Don't stay there, so you can avoid surprises in what it takes to costumer care.The cleaning was not perfect, not a 4 star in my opinion.Asi said.....AVOID!!!!

reviews.title: Nice beach stay, although you have to walk south to find a nice spot for swimming. Would recommend!
reviews.positives: Great location, central, close to the beach, nice facilities and friendly staff!
reviews.negatives: Breakfast could have been a little better, but it wasn't bad

reviews.title: No reason to come to PQ
reviews.text:
This is a mediocre resort that is overbuilt and claustrophobic and situated on a lousy beach. Many of the rooms look onto the backs of other buildings, despite being called “Panorama”

The service is poor and geared to Vietnamese so the food choices and quality are very poor and the breakfast is miserable.

There is absolutely no reason to visit Phu Quoc if you are going to stay in this place.
reviews.positives: Can't think of any

reviews.positives: Great place to stay right on the ocean front and budget friendly. Great pool area for kids and easy walking distance to the night markets.

reviews.positives: Nice & friendly waiters

Dear Mr Vinh,

On behalf of management, thank you very much for your stay at Sai Gon Phu Quoc Resort & Spa in recent holiday.

reviews.title: I would return to this resort even with its concerns.
reviews.positives:
The staff were great and upgraded our room. This was very welcoming. The location and property were perfect. I would recommend this place. 
The food was also fantastic, including the breakfast.
reviews.negatives:
As much as it is beautiful, there is issues. The shower, which is in the bathtub, not a problem, but it is only the hand held head on a holder which rotates. The water gets everywhere, no matter how you try to keep it contained. The bathroom floor gets soaked. 
The other major concern, is that they do not have sufficient garbage cans around the property, and absolutely none on the beach. People were leaving garbage by the beds, as there was nowhere to put this. Please add garbage bins along the beach. 
Our 3rd day in, not sure if it was weather or wind related, there was suddenly an influx of garbage, dead fish and other objects washing up on the beach. You did not want to get in the ocean, as you would be swimming with plastic bags and who knows what. Very sad really. 
My wife and myself collected more than 1 & 1/2 bin bags full of garbage because we felt inclined to be part of helping the planet. It took us to start doing this before the staff got involved. Which was only for half hour before they just stopped. This was only one person, the other staff were not around. They did however come take photos then leave not sure what this does.

reviews.title: Facility is not good. Beach is not good also. Staff is not profesional. Food is so so. Price is too expensive. This hotel rank is under 3 star while they mention 4.5 star. Driver is so bad. Only massa
reviews.text: None

reviews.title: Awesome !! Highly recommend.
reviews.positives:
Awesome place. Our cottage was literally 10 steps from the beach. being able to sit out on the balcony and watch the sun go down was amazing. The room itself was very comfortable and tastefully furnished. The mini bar was well stocked and replenished daily.
Staff are all very helpful and happy to assist in any way they can. Majority speak English.

reviews.title: Terrible
reviews.text: We arrived the hotel 90 min early.  They said the rooms were not ready.  Then it's 2pm, they told us one of the two rooms was ready but the other had issue with the toilet.  They was fixing it & ready in an hour.  An hour later we got the room then late afternoon the AC did not walk.  We reported & they sent someone to check but they did not fix it.  By 10pm, it was too hot our daughter & us could not sleep.  We walked to the main office they told us all the room was booked up & could not give us any room.  We booked 2 Beach front Villa.  About 1am the reception sent us to a small room to stay over night because the AC was broken & they could not fix until the morning.  From a front beach villa, they moved us to a manager's office above the cooking area very small.  We could not sleep all night so it ruined our next day trip.  Our daughter was tired & could not go any where at we planned.   In returned for the trouble they gave us a free night for next visit within a year.  It's not worth it because there is no way we could come back.  It took us a long way to visit Phu Quoc from USA for 2 nights.  I am so disappointed & upset at the same time.   I hope the management of this hotel will do better to help tourists to enjoy their visit.  Not everyone have time to take vacation, please think about that and give the customers at least enough service for what they pay.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Staff are very helpful and friendly

reviews.title: Old resort hotel upgraded (poorly)!
reviews.text:
The hotel is I believe the oldest on Phu Quoc Island. It has been upgraded, but not really very well. They seem to cater to the Russian Market in particular.
The room is acceptable, the bathrooms leave a lot to desire.
Wifi works slowly but all over the hotel.
Breakfast is about as bad as it gets! Huge choice of everything you don't want! No cornflakes, no museli etc, but lots of kids things like coco pops!!
Advice go for room only and eat outside.
reviews.positives: It's not far from the airport and town.

reviews.title: Amazing location, beautiful facility, friendly staff, delicious breakfast!
reviews.positives: BEACH! beautiful rooms. friendly staff. good breakfast, good coffee!

reviews.title: pretty ordinary 4.5 star, but good in comparison
reviews.text: if you are looking for water sports and some activity forget this resort. beach is pretty ordinary and facilities very poor,there is a pontoon in the water but when you try to climb on to it via the ladder its nearly impossible because the ladder has 2 bolts that hold it down, missing. menu at the restuarant is very poor unless you want the bar b que which is on every night.we looked at some resorts near by and on comparison this was pretty good, but still not our cup of tea. All in all we were a bit dissapointed, same old story, you imagine one thing but the reality is quite different
reviews.positives: not much

reviews.title: Amazing resort
reviews.positives: Absolutely loved this resort. The staff members were kind and helpful, the breakfast had everything, amenities were perfect (they refill your drinking water daily), you could easily change currency, beach was supervised and the atmosphere was very relaxing.
reviews.negatives: The pool was perfect but it was a little challenging for seniors to go in due to the rock decoration circling the pool

Reminded me of a cheap 2 star motel with a plastic shower curtain.  Really the only positive about this resort is the direct beach access.

the booking and booking confirmation were very efficient. However, the hotel quality was very avarge and the managment was very bureaucratic.

Si tu réserves la bas et que tes dates ou ta chambre ne convient pas. Tu dois les payer et réserver d'autres dates. Inadmissible !

reviews.title: Old hotel which is not reccomended
reviews.text:
After a lot of bad hotel experience, we only booked one night here to start with and we kissed our luck stars we did.
Saigon Phu Quoc Resort & Spa is old and dirty and we couldn't even get our self to stay one night.
Restaurant is expencive and the food is not really good.
Would reccomend to find another hotel.
reviews.positives: Location was good

reviews.title: Pourraient beaucoup mieux faire
reviews.positives:
L’emplacement du bungalow devant la mer 
La piscine 
Le prêt de vélo 
Les femmes de chambre très polies et très propres
reviews.negatives:
Le petit déjeuner 
L’accueil des employés nous sommes restés un mois et nous n’avons jamais eu un bonjour aux petits déjeuners 
Les réceptionnistes de l’accueil m’ont prise pour une imbecile car on voulait rester encore une semaine dans le même bungalow et elles m’ont dit qu’il était pris pour 1mois le lendemain il n’y avait plus personne 😡

reviews.title: So far from a 4 star
reviews.text: We stayed in a beach front bungalow , very cosy and amazing view . And that’s the only part we liked ! In general the hotel operates like 2 star hotel . No beach towels or sun bed mattresses  were provided , I had to ask for TWO DAYS until someone finally brought it . The balcony wasn’t cleaned when we arrived ! The door to the balcony very old not closing well what makes the room very attractive to lizards . The hotel very old, especially the area around the pool looks like it was fixed 10 years ago  ! And the staff is just there ...  not much welcoming or helpful .  Won’t comeback again ! But have to agree the view and beach were stunning !

reviews.title: Le personnel exceptionnel
reviews.positives: Le personnel, efficace, souriant
reviews.negatives: Vieillissant, à besoin de rénovation

reviews.title: High-end glamping on the beach
reviews.text: Would highly recommend this property if you are looking to be beachfront glamping. If looking for a 4-Star hotel though, would not recommend. Beach front villas with huge patio decks were a plus, breakfast buffet and ten minute walk to Night Market and good restaurants were great. That said, villas were small, had an odd odor, and you have to keep the A/C on very high to ward off mosquitos and geckos. (Some rooms have mosquito nets over beds in fact.) my husband, who loves to camp, loved it but I was looking for more comfort.

reviews.title: Heureusement qu’il y a l’emplacement et la plage !!!
reviews.positives:
L’emplacement de cet hôtel est idéal, bord de plage et centre ville à environ 1km. 
Tout est bien fait pour la plage, parasol et transat sont à disposition.
reviews.negatives:
Gros points positifs pour le personnel au niveau des chambres et restaurant, tous sont très gentils et serviables. 
Au niveau de la réception, tour desk etc… certains sont peu efficaces, manque de compétence et surtout peu serviables pour un hotel Resort de 4 étoiles. Nous avons été dans les hôtels avec moins d’étoiles et tous nous ont aidé à réserver avec bonne volonté nos billets d’avion, bus, bateau etc…
Évitez surtout d’acheter leur tour de visite du sud de l’île, qui est tout simplement un tour de shopping. On n’a eu quasiment aucune explication sur la fabrication des produits spécifiques à l’île (Nuoc mam, poivre, SIM alcool…) à peine arrivé vous êtes tout de suite invités à acheter des produits !!! 
Le buffet de petit déjeuner est plutôt médiocre pour un hôtel s’affichant 4 étoiles, on a beaucoup mieux mangé dans les hôtels 3 étoiles.

reviews.title: Très très bien. Nous y reviendrons sans problème.
reviews.positives:
Petit-déjeuner, restaurant. Propreté. Services à toute heure du jour et de la nuit. Compréhension de la réception pour trouver des solutions aux questions. Plage dans la partie sud de l'hôtel très bien. Emplacement parfait, on peut aller à pied au marché de nuit et au centre ville sans problème.
Ensemble de petites maisons et bungalow semé dans un parc très bien arboré ce qui donne beaucoup de charme, plus qu'un building en béton. Avec une vue au travers des palmiers .... superbe. 
On ne peut pas être plus près de la plage !!! Nous étions dans une maison de 4 chambres avec terrasse, la rangée juste au dessus des bungalows... impeccable... Il y a aussi un petit immeuble de 3 étages (sans ascenseur) avec des chambres vue  mer et jardin.
reviews.negatives: Il est vrai qu'un "refresh" peut être envisagé mais ce n'est pas rédhibitoire.

reviews.text: I made a reservation to take a break because of the late-night flight schedule.  The smell of mold was very severe from the first time I entered the room, and it was the same until I checked out. I would never recommend it if it was for accommodation purposes.

reviews.text:
Private villa is right on the beach, a wonderful location. Transfers to hotel and airport were great! 
Place requires work. We had to request a mosquito net for our bed as it was not there as promised on booking. Was not put up properly on request. Pool is green and not well keept. Bathrooms are old and unclean. Garden maintenance was going on early in the morning that was loud. Gym is unbearable, smells of mould and the cardio machines do not work. Unfotunately I would not recommend. The location is stunning but the villa is overpriced for what you get.

reviews.positives:

On y serai rester avec plaisir plus longtemps

Le personnel est un peu « coincé « . 
Quand nous sommes allés au restaurant tout avait bien commencé puis il y a eu une soirée privative avec une musique très forte. On peut comprendre qu’ils organisent ce genre de soirée mais autant nous prévenir 
Mais si je pouvais y revenir j’y reviendrais

reviews.title: A bit of a disappointment
reviews.text: We were very disappointed. They were nice enough to upgrade us to a bigger room as we were three traveling together, but aside from the porter and one of the front desk attendants, the majority of the staff weren't very helpful, and at times quite rude. The buffet dinner was overpriced and very disappointing. We went to the spa the next day, and WHAT a disappointent. The attendants were chatting and noisy and did a very poor job after which they tried to intimidate us into giving them upward of a 50% tip. Our room's bathroom stank and they weren't really able to fix it. If you're looking for a super basic hotel with a nice location, a nice breakfast and a pretty view of the ocean, then I'd say avoid the spa and buffet and lower your expectations and you should be fine.

reviews.title: Good location and breakfast but bad front desk staff
reviews.text: It’s 8 minute walk to the Night Market, or you can take bus 17 free, which you can also take to the famous show Tinh Hoa Vietnam. Breakfast is good with hot Vietnamese and Western dishes. The girl serving hot soup is nice.  The private beach is beautiful. But the front desk staff is a disappointment for a 4 star hotel, except for Binbin, who checked us in. He’s okay; the others need to be retrained! They don’t even say hello or say May I Help You when you come to the front desk; and when we callled regarding a banging construction noise at 9 in the morning , they didn’t even apologize or offer a viable solution.

reviews.title: Staff behaviour
reviews.text:
Stayed at Saigon Phu Quoc Resort & Spa and had a very disappointing experience.

The AC in the room was not working properly and the room was extremely hot. We had already submitted the room keys at the counter, but later they still talked about extra charges for the keys. The glasses were not broken, they were just missing, yet extra charges were mentioned without proper clarification.

The hotel also feels very old and poorly maintained. Overall, the service and handling of issues were disappointing. Would not recommend based on this

reviews.title: wenig charmantes Strandhotel im wenig charmanten Phu Quoc
reviews.positives: Lage am Strand, gutes Frühstück
reviews.negatives:
Einiges: wer weit hinten wohnt, hat reichlich Straßenlärm und laute Musik von der Bar gegenüber. Die Liegestühle auf der Terasse sind unbrauchbar. Wir hatten immer wieder Schwierigkeiten mit der Schlüsselkarte: kein Strom oder die Tür ging nicht auf.
Strand und Meer sind nicht schön. Wie immer zu wenig Liegen. Service an den Liegen ist nicht vorgesehen, obwohl genug untätiges Personal vorhanden ist. Nur sehr energisches Nachfragen hat Erfolg.
90% der Gäste sind Russen, der Rest Chinesen, Koreaner und wenige Europäer.
Fitnessstudio: was als solches bezeichnet wird, sind 3 Laufbänder neben Billardtisch und Tischfußball.

In diesem Hotel ist nichts liebevoll oder schnuckelig.
 Es gibt auch keine netten Strandlokale in der Nähe. Das abendliche Leben findet auf der Hauptstraße statt

reviews.title: Recent Stay 4/21/23
reviews.text: Thế facility location is great.  However, the facility is outdated.  The service staffs are nice.  The restaurant staffs are not as attentive.  Breakfast was ok, nothing special.  The bungalow room with ocean view was nice, but over priced.  I would rate this facility a 2.5 to 3 stars at best.

reviews.title: Tolle Anlage mit Defiziden !!!
reviews.positives: Wir hatten einen wunderschönen Bungalow mit Meerblick. Die Aussicht war grandios und wir erlebten fantastische Sonnenuntergänge. Zum Frühstück gab es alles was man brauchte. Kurze Wege zum Nachtmarkt bzw. zu vielen Restaurants, Ständen und Supermärkten außerhalb des Hotels.
reviews.negatives: Jetzt kommt leider das grosse Aber. Es gibt viel zu wenige Liegen und Sonnenschirme in der Anlage!!  Unsere Bungalows hatten zwar die Liegen auf der Terrasse aber leider keinen Sonnenschutz. Auf Nachfrage wurde uns ein kostenpflichtiger Sonnenschirm gestellt. Der Zweite war nicht zu bekommen, weil nicht genug da waren. Ein Schirm für 4 Personen war ein bisschen wenig. Natürlich hätten wir auch um sechs Uhr aufstehen können, um ein paar Liegen mit Handtüchern zu besetzen, aber das ist leider nicht unser Stil. Da wir 15 Nächte dort waren, ist uns ebenfalls aufgefallen, dass dort mind. einmal die Woche  irgendwelche private Feiern ablaufen. Wir wurden aber schriftlich darauf hingewiesen. Gewünscht hätten wir uns auch aufmerksameres Personal. Das Frühstück war super, es gab alles was man brauchte, aber Achtung,  wer sein Kaffee am Morgen braucht, bringt ihn euch unbedingt mit, der im Hotel ist ungenießbar. ( ist natürlich Geschmackssache ). Ansonsten müsste das Hotel von Grund auf neu renoviert werden. Zum Schluss muss ich noch etwas los werden, was für uns gar nicht ging. Mein Mann ist ein Glas im Zimmer umgefallen und natürlich kaputt gegangen. Wir wunderten uns schon, dass dieses nicht ersetzt wurde, bis wir auschecken wollten und die Dame uns sagte, wir sollten für das kaputte Glas zahlen. Das ist ein absolutes No Go. Es wurde uns dann zwar erlassen, weil wir uns wehrten, aber es legte ein ganz komisches Geschmäckle auf unsere Zunge!

reviews.title: Nice facility but management does not know how to run it
reviews.text:
On a day when there were trash on the beach, I saw several workers were sitting around and not clean the beach. Management needs to understand how to clean the beach early and often- I mean if the sun rises at 5:30, the beach should be clean and ready for use by that time, not until 9:00- suggestion- hire a new manager to manage this property
Second, check-in staffs do not speak English- come on how hard is to find staffers that can communicate in English, better pay will bring in better qualified staffers and by the way, you don't need to hire too many people just sitting around and do little work!

reviews.title: Schönes Ressort direkt am Strand und trotzdem zentral gelegen
reviews.positives:
Schönes Ressort direkt am Strand. Trotzdem ist alles sofort erreichbar, die Einkaufsstraße unmittelbar und der Night Market circa 1 km entfernt.
Der Pool war toll. Und am Meer gab es immer ausreichend Liegen. Vor allem war es aber nicht so voll wie in den benachbarten Ressorts.
Sehr gutes Frühstück. Freundliches Personal. Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt.

Das Frühstücksbuffet hielt für jeden etwas bereit und wechselt sich jeden Tag etwas ab.

The king size bed ess two small beds put together - uncomfortable and not acceptable
The good sucked - I travel through our Asia for work and this is the worst breakfast ever.
I'm upset that a compliment shuttle to the airport is given bet not to the ferry.  It's stupid that I'm charged$15 usd for a taxi when I've spend hundred off dollars at the hotel.

Insgesamt dank dem beach bungalow unser nr 1 hotel der Insel, und wir waren auch in 5 
stern
reviews.positives: Für strand und meerliebhaber gibt's kaum besseres als dort einen beach bungalow. Man steht auf, geht von seiner eigenen Terrasse auf den Strand und ins glasklare Meer. Frühstück voll ok, ist nicht 5 stern aber alles da, Früchte, Suppe, eierkoch. Bett angenehm hart, gute Matratze wer eben hart mag. 3 Tage keinen Müll am Strand oder Meer gesehen, aber war auch kein Wind.

reviews.title: Much money for nothing special
reviews.text: Sorry but I really didn't like the hotel. I think I paid too much money for nothing. Starting about the transfer from airport to the hotel. Agoda said they would pick up, later they sent a message saying their schedule was from 7am-1pm (something like that), and we should take a taxi. I wrote "friendly" email and then they changed and pick us up. Breakfast is the best part. Apart from this I would never recommend the hotel. The pictures looks nice but the hotel is old, the beach is very small, the tourist info is precarious. We asked for a map and they gave us a black ad white. We got better one in another hotel....and so, and so....
reviews.positives: The breakfast, bicycles, close to the village.

reviews.title: Wir waren das erste Mal da und es hat uns gefallen
reviews.positives:
Wir wollten ein Paar Tage direkt am Wasser und Fußläufig sodass wir auch mal Abends spazieren gehen können ohne Taxi zu rufen. Da nicht so viel los war im Resort fiel das Frühstück etwas kleiner aus aber als dann mehr Gäste kamen wurde es erweitert. 
Die Zimmer waren sauber und hatte eine kleine Terrasse mit Badewanne. Unser Bungalow war direkt am Meer. Es war wunderbar den Sonnenuntergang zu beobachten. 
Personal war freundlich und zuvorkommend nur mit der Sprache hat es ein wenig gehapert was wir aber mit Übersetzerapp alles hinbekommen haben
reviews.negatives: Ein kleiner Tip. Evtl. die Liegen auf dem Balkon mit einem Polster ausstatten denn die waren sehr unbequem. Das Frühstück könnte ein klein wenig mehr Obst haben denn das hat gefehlt

reviews.positives: Room view,nice gardens

reviews.title: Super Urlaub, sehr gut erholt und mit vielen Eindrücken von Insel wieder heimgeflogen
reviews.positives:
Die Palmen genau vor der Terrasse, den Blick aufs Meer und den Sonnenuntergang im Meer beobachten! Von der Terrasse über 7 Stufen laufen und schon im Meer baden können, was will man mehr??? Die Anlage an sich macht einen sehr gepflegten Eindruck.
Mit Meeresrauschen einschlafen und aufwachen!!!
Perfekter Urlaub!!!
Das Personal war super freundlich, die Betten mega bequem und riesengroß! Klimaanlage und Ventilator sind vorhanden.
Frühstück war umfangreich!
Wir hatten kein Ungeziefer im Zimmer!
Es gab kostenlose Strandtücher am Pool! Der Pool wurde jeden Morgen gereinigt, wir waren aber nicht drinnen, wir baden lieber im sauberen Meer! Roller können für ca 7 Euro überall gebucht werden.
In der angrenzenden Straße konnten wir 14 Tage lang immer woanders essen, die Auswahl an Restaurants und kleinen Küchen ist riesig und sehr schmackhaft! Kleiner Tip: Hallo und Danke in Vietnamesisch zu sagen ist für die Einheimischen schon ein Highlight!!!!
reviews.negatives:
Wir wollen und können nicht meckern! Asien ist nicht Deutschland! Sicherlich gab es hier und da ein paar Sachen, aber man sollte auch das Klima bedenken, salzige Meeresluft, erhöhte Luftfeuchtigkeit, all das wirkt sich eben auf die Gebäude aus! 
Die Liegen und die Auflagen am Strand müssten mal erneuert werden!

reviews.title: Great location, nice beach but the bed is so  bad
reviews.text:
Good service, friendly staff, great location ( near night market with many fresh seafood).
 But the only thing I really dont like is the bed. The material of the bed sheet is not good and look not clean... and have bed bugs in the bed!!! So terrible when have bed bugs in the bed, its really itchy and never stop til a week or more
reviews.positives: nice beach

Die Lage ist sehr zentral und man kann fußläufig viel unternehmen. Empfehlenswert ist es jedoch einen Roller zu mieten👌🏼
reviews.negatives: Da gibt es nichts, es wird gerade nach Corona viel aufgeholt- also alles gut.

reviews.title: Adequate but well located
reviews.text: It was a very pleasant stay, the hotel is from an older generation of tourism that really has to improve its image in the modern age. The location is perfect, the beach and setting fantastic, the layout is good. The restaurant is antiquated, the breakfast being good enough but the seating is poor. The staff try hard but lack organization, the management could improve.
reviews.positives: Location, the beach, the bar

reviews.title: Schöner Aufenthalt mit sehr nettem Personal, aber optimierungsberarf vorhanden.
reviews.positives:
Das Zimmer war sehr sauber und wurde jeden Tag gereinigt. Schöne bequeme große Betten, großes Bad, Klima, Kühlschrank, Balkon mit Blick auf’s Meer… was will man mehr.
Ein schöner Pool, groß und tief genug um da auch gemütlich ein paar Runden zu ziehen. Das Personal ist sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit, haben uns sogar mehrfach Liegen vom Strand geholt, da am Pool nicht ausreichend waren. Das Frühstück und die abendliche Restaurantküche ist auch wirklich gut, besser als viele andere Straßen-Garküchen und vergleichbare Restaurants.
Direkte Strandlage ist auch nicht zu verachten, also man kann mit Badehose einfach kurz ins Meer hüpfen… schon wirklich toll.
Es gibt Billard, eine Bücherregal, einen leider verzogenen alten Kickertisch und einem Tennisplatz (haben wir nicht genutzt).
Man konnte um die Ecke einen mehrere kleine Mini-Supermärkte finden, genauso wie unzählige Restaurants und Massagen, aber alles was teurer als an vielen anderen Orten im Land. Einkaufen geht sonst gut mit dem Fahrrad im nahe gelegenen King Kong Markt.
reviews.negatives:
Die Anlage ist etwas in die Jahre gekommen, das merkt man überall. Der Fahrradverleih hatte für uns nur ein “funktionierendes” Rad, meines hatte einen losen Sattel, Bremsen die ihrem Namen nicht gerecht wurden und kaputte Lager überall, spürte und hörte man. Weitere Fahrräder Fehlanzeige. Am Pool waren nur 6 Liegen plus Schirme, die allesamt schon morgens belegt/reserviert waren und man hat uns zwar welche vom Strand besorgt, aber dann ohne Schirm und das bei voller Sonne… nicht so schön. Wäscherei Service sollte man nicht buchen, kostet pro Teil nicht wenig… 200m entfernt kann man per Kilo abgerechnet seine Sachen waschen lassen, da würde ich mir den Service im Hotel wünschen, ebenso wie eine direkte Kooperation mit einem Rollerverleih, wie es in anderen Hotels im Land üblich ist. 
Lage war auch so lala… etwas weiter südwärts ist der Strand schöner, da hier Betonblöcke und Sandsäcke gegen die Sediment Abtragung liegen und in den Zimmern auf Straßenseite hört man diese auch. Es ist aber ok, da es abends da ja viel ruhiger ist. Alles aus einer Hand hat man hier daher leider nicht, trotzdem Preis-/Leistung wars schon gut.

reviews.title: No thrills, comfortable, near airport/night mkt
reviews.text: Comfortable but it was not worth the $150 per night rate I paid.  Rooms and facilities Are quite dated. Bkfst basic but good enough. Beach/pool clean and nice.
reviews.positives: Clean beach

reviews.title: Das Paradies mit leichten Alterserscheinungen
reviews.positives: Die Lage ist ein absoluter Traum. Ich war in einem Bungalow direkt am Strand, keine 30 Meter und ich war im Meer. Sonnenuntergang überm Meer unverstellt direkt von meiner Balkonterasse aus, besser geht es nicht. Zimmer grundsätzlich gemütlich, sehr sauber. Frühstück gut, Restaurant ok. Aber vom Hotel läuft man keine 5 Minuten und hat eine große Auswahl an Restaurants und Supermärkten. Der Nachtmarkt ist ca. 10 Minuten  zu Fuß entfernt. Das Hotel ermöglicht also Ruhe, ohne dass man nicht auch die Möglichkeit hat schnell wieder mitten im Leben zu sein. Der Strand wird sauber gehalten, es gibt "hoteleigene" Liegen (wobei nicht nur Hotelgäste diese zu benutzen scheinen) und Sonnenschirme. Der Strand ist schön flach. Am Pool werden Strandtücher zur Verfügung gestellt.
reviews.negatives: Das Hotel hat insgesamt schon bessere Tage gesehen. Zeigt sich zB daran, dass die Türen und Fenster nicht komplett schließen, weil total verzogen. Da geht von der AC mehr nach draußen als im Zimmer bleibt. Die Anlage ist überwiegend gut gepflegt und sauber. Wobei vor den unbewohnten Einheiten auch viel Müll lagert. Es ist ein öffentlicher Strandabschnitt (keine Beschwerde, nur eine Feststellung) und ist auch von Einheimischen und Gästen anderer Hotels gut besucht, das wird auch mal etwas lauter/turbulenter (gerade am Wochenende) gleichzeitig kann man aber 24/7 das Leben mit und am Meer beobachten.

reviews.title: First time
reviews.text: Our stay was nice. When we first got there the beach was dirty but the staff cleaned it up. The staff weren't as accommodating as I would have hoped with the amenities. The staff weren't nice with our guests who we had travelled far to see. Resort was well kept and food was great! Communication could have been better.
reviews.positives: Food, wifi,

reviews.title: overpriced but great location and buffet
reviews.text: I had a pleasant stay. Apart from the odd thing broken or requiring attention (air con filters needed cleaning)I liked the pool and the beachfront bungalow was literally alomost on the beach! Very comfortable though I did have problems with the shower and hot water. Great breakfast buffet with nice views and the beach is lovely (esp for kids) because there are no waves and the tide doesn't seem to go out or come in!easy walk into town also for a walk around the fishing village. Price double in high season and became not great value for money...but for low season price...it was bang on value for money!
reviews.positives: beachfront bungalow, calm ocean with no tidal range and great buffet!

reviews.negatives: An 1 Abend war eine Feier auf der unteren Terasse am Strand. Nun gut. Lautes Karaoke. Es war aber um 20h30 vorbei. Also akzeptabel.

reviews.title: Good location, but features are quite dated
reviews.text: the location of the hotel is great since it is walking distance from the night market. however the hotel is quite dated and the beach isn't as great as we expected. unless you are staying in the vip suites, you would not be next to the beach with a view. another disappointing factor was that we were forced to attend the christmas dinner that was very costly for mediocre food. if we could, we would have opt out of it. i'm not sure if it's due to the season, but there were many mosquitos that entered our room because the balcony door doesn't close completely. don't expect 5 star quality resort features because the hotel is very dated.
reviews.positives: Walking distance from the city center

reviews.title: Perfekt
reviews.positives: Bungalow direkt am Strand - perfekt, besser geht es nicht. Das Personal ist durchweg sehr freundlich und zuvorkommend. Frühstücksbuffet sehr gut, asiatisch/europäisch gemischt, der europäische Teil fällt kleiner aus. Lage sehr gut, Nachtmarkt fußläufig zu erreichen. Es gibt einen kostenlosen Shuttle vom/zum Flughafen. Wir empfehlen dieses Hotel.

reviews.title: Nice hotel with access to beach
reviews.text: Lovely hotel, nice beach, good breakfast buffet.  Hotel offers free bicycle rental for its guests, we borrow double-seat bikes and ride to the market everyday.  There is also motorcycle rental with good rate in front of hotel.
reviews.positives: Nice hotel with access to beach, free bicycle rental

reviews.title: Exceptional

Die Straße mit den Geschäften und Streetfood-Ständen ist schnell zu erreichen. Auch für Familien mit Kindern gut geeignet. Sehr bequem: kostenloser Flughafen-Shuttle.
reviews.negatives: Die Anlage ist in die Jahre gekommen, aber sehr gut gepflegt.

reviews.title: Decent hotel on a pretty average island
reviews.text:
This is a nice hotel with nice grounds but only worth a 3 star rating. Towels were worn to the point of having holes in them, and everything generally a bit tired.

The beach in front of the hotel certainly didn't live up to other reviews, not did the island as a whole. The beach had rubbish in the water and at the high tide mark which we found disgusting considering we were on an island. The town centre and night market is an easy 10 min stroll or you can use one of the free bikes.   

Staff friendly and helpful.

Overall not a bad place to stay but for the cost of it we would try elsewhere if there was a next time (which there won't be as we found the island very average to say the least)
reviews.positives: Beachfront, great pool, nice breakfast, room big and clean

reviews.title: Rundum zufrieden! Super Lage!

reviews.negatives: Sehr wenig private liegen am privat Strand, sodass es eigentlich nicht möglich war eine Strandliege zu ergattern, da viele Gäste früh morgens aufgestanden sind und die rund zehn Liegen mit Handtüchern für sich reserviert haben. Der private Strandabschnitt ist sehr schmal, aber 100m weiter kann man super liegen für 80k am Tag an einer Strandbar reservieren.

The hotel is too old. The beach was landslide. Though travellers still can swim at the beach, they suggested that I should go to Sao Beach for swimming. That made me so disappointed. 
I think this hotel is equivalent to a 2-star hotel.  The price is too high for such an old hotel like that. 
Now there are so many modern hotels, resorts or homestays in Phu quoc with a half price. 
The floor is not really clean. My baby didnt get on slippers in the room, she run on the floor then  jumped up and down on the bed, which made the linen dirty.

reviews.title: 4星なら朝食をもっと充実して欲しい。
reviews.positives: 老朽化が忍び寄っているホテルだか、部屋は旧式豪華仕様ながら綺麗で、写真どうりのビーチフロント。白砂青松でなく薄黄砂ヤシの木。海は透明度あり20〜30m先まで砂底の遠浅で、浜も毎朝綺麗に掃除されている。ヤシの木共々180度の水平線は気持ち良い。プールも小さいが綺麗に維持されている。徒歩圏にコンビニあり水確保OK。周辺は観光客目当ての高価海鮮料理屋ばかり。Wi-Fiは全域で強い。
reviews.negatives: 5泊したが、朝食は最低貧弱レベルでガッカリ！8時過ぎて行くと残飯状態。毎食変わり映えしない内容で飽きた。果物さえわずか。オムレツとフォーでお腹を満たした。コロナ影響？４星ホテルは遠い過去の遺物？ホテルレストランでの夕食は値段だけ立派に高かった。シャワーの湯栓の方は触れるだけで熱い熱湯なので注意が必要。シャワーヘッドが水圧で抜け、二回の再修理依頼でやっと交換。ドラム式乾燥機は部屋にもホテルにも無く、有料のランドリーが有るだけなので注意！前払いとあるが、当日支払請求される場合があって紛らわしので注意必要。街中までは近すぎ、安価すぎるのでGrab利用を控えざるをえず、トゥクトゥク3万VNDを勧められた。

他の方も指摘されていますが、バスタブでシャワーを浴びると壁伝いにお湯が床に流れ床がびしょびしょになりひと工夫が必要です。

reviews.title: Nice resort but not worth the price
reviews.text: the room in the hotel was nice, clean and with enough space and an amazing shower.  it was also good to have a lot on the resort (swimming pool, spa etc.) but the quality of everything was not worth the price. the breakfast was basic and it could be much better. the beach looks really nice, but after a dive into the water i found out that there are many rocks under the water. nobody warned me about it so that was pretty dangerouse. both the hotel restaurant served the same food over the day and the menu is not that special. i also went to the spa, the people there don't speak englisch at all and the treatments are not what you expected to be on a resort like this.i found a better spa for a better price the day after.  this all looks like a lot of complaining. we had a good time, but i'll never go back here and i would not recommend this place to people. this because there are better places on this island were you pay less and you get more. the breakfast (included) is not as good as it should be. i've been to many different places so i know what a 4star resort should be.
reviews.positives: Clean room

reviews.title: Reasonable Hotel (good by Phu Quoc standards).
reviews.text: we moved here from a hotel down the road (formerly the cuulong, but renamed, which was awful).  as such, expectations were low-ish.  however, we were pleasantly surprised.  rooms are good size, location is great and the pool and beach are most convenient.  that said, the place could do with a deep clean as its just a bit shabby.  it would probably scrape a 3* rating in singapore, for example, but overall not bad.  the free shuttle to the airport, linked directly to each flight departure, was much appreciated.
reviews.positives: Location and size of rooms

reviews.title: Great expectations, alas a letdown
reviews.text: This was supposed to be the best of three locations we had chosen for our mini tour of Vietnam, however it turned out not so good. It started with a long wait in the lobby before the room was ready, then our Panorama room had a limited panorama stooping in a forest of palm trees just beyond the balcony and further buildings blocking the view of the sea. 2nd day in we had a massive water leak from the ceiling in the bathroom quickly shutting of the electricity, and flooding first the bathroom and then in the main room, we quickly got a new room, but no appologies or any acknowledgement from the management. The beach was blocked with a concrret wall, luckily there were no objections to use the beach of the neighbouring hotel! Service from the staff was not very good culminating in the accusations on check-out that a bowl was missing from our room, we had to give a written statement that we had not taken this bowl.
reviews.positives: Setting and gardens. Breakfast was excellent.

reviews.title: Nice , clean, well located  but ......
reviews.text:
We had a bungalow close to the sea, and the view and the room were amazing. The room was clean, the hotel overall was nice, and the breakfast was quite decent.

However, there were several issues.

In the afternoons, many tourists come to use the outdoor showers located near the villas. Even though the staff member in charge tries to stop people, they arrive in large groups. There are no clear signs preventing outside visitors from entering, so throughout the day you see people walking through the resort from the street to access the beach. On some days, there were even very drunk individuals using the resort’s seating areas. The staff member does try his best, but without proper signage or stricter control, it is difficult to manage.

Around 5 p.m., you lose all sense of quiet and peace. The noise from the pool becomes extremely loud , the music volume is so high that the windows vibrate. You can call reception and they will lower the volume slightly, but having to call every day becomes frustrating.

On our last day the day before the last to be exact, I had a disappointing experience. I had opened a new bottle of sunscreen the day before expensive and popular Korean sunscreen , and after the final room cleaning, the bottle was suddenly empty. I reported it, but nothing was done. It’s unfortunate that while you feel the need to store your phone in the safe, you might also have to secure personal items like sunscreen and lotions. That was not a pleasant way to end the stay.

That said, the cleaning staff did a good job, and overall the hotel is clean and well maintained. With better control of outside visitors and improved noise management, the experience could be much better.

Mình không được thông báo về thời gian phục vụ và nghĩ sẽ giống với những nơi khác là 10h cho nên khoảng 9h20 mình xuống nhà hàng thì nhân viên báo anh/chị lấy đồ ăn nhanh để em dọn. 9h30 bên em dọn. reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Был в этом резоте неделю с 12 ноября 25г. Выбирал, по близости к центру города ( ниже к северу в центре Логн-бич был в прошлый раз) плюс близость к морю - 1я линия (понимая, что чем ближе к центру, тем море будет хуже, т.к в него втекает река и она не очень чистая. Видно на карте).    
Итак, по местоположению, все отлично - до центра , набережной и ночного рынка пешком 10 минут. Рядом много ресторанов, кафе и т.д на любой бюджет, по дороге к центру есть Кинг конг маркет, т.е все как и хотел. Ближе к центру ничего достойного больше нет.
Резот немного "уставший", но не критичного, все компенсирует большая, очень ухоженная и зеленая территория. Бассейн большой, хороший.
Завтраки - шведский стол, всего достаточно. Есть ресторан, вечером можно поужинать с видом на море. 
Номера чистые - уборка ежедневная, кондей охлаждает, тут все в порядке. 
Море чистое, мусора особо не заметил. Лежаков достаточно, свободные всегда были, можно и под пальмой в тени и на солнце.  Фото номеров и территории соответствует действительности.
Фотография пляжа старая, лет 10 назад он был таким, в настоящее время, осталась узкая полоска метра 3, песок просто вымыло волнами, сотрудники видно пытались его восстановить, но бросили это дело. В принципе это особо не мешает, заход в воду нормальный, но тем кто хочет полежать на песке - не получится. Слева прилегает хороший, широкий пляж, на который можно легко перейти (пляж относится к резоту L'Azure Resort and Spa, если в него будет вариант, берите его). 
В общем понравилось, данное место для хорошего отдыха совершенно пригодно)).

reviews.title: Just average overall
reviews.text:
Quickly checked in and got an upgrade to a separate duplex room with doors to both room since
we reserved two rooms and traveled as 2 couples which is nice. The room was clean and well 
maintained but the facility is showing its age. We liked the friendly, helpful staff and the
room except two things. The bed is a good king size bed but the mattress is as hard as rock.
I ended up having a backache after 3 day staying.  The other thing is the wifi. The ads claimed
free wifi but we couldn't connect to the hotel wifi most of the time. At the rare instances 
that we connected, we couldn't get onto the Internet or it super slow and eventually log us out.

However, for the price we paid for the beach front villa, I would expect more. The villa is decent in size but basic, especially the bathroom. The resort says it's 4 stars and it certainly tries to be but I've stayed in better at less price. However, Phu Quoc now seems to be expensive everywhere so maybe it's in line with other prices.

reviews.title: Great location but overpriced
reviews.text: We booked the Saigon Phu Quoc Resort because we wanted a beach front suite with multiple adjoining rooms for our family. The first suite they put us in was not actually on the beach so we had to insist on a beach front unit. Then they put us in one on the end next to a bunch of construction, so our view was not as idyllic as we would have hoped for the price we were paying. It was very expensive but very nice. The staff were all very friendly and helpful. The wifi was less than optimal and it took many tries to connect and took hours to send a couple of emails. The food and other activities were all very expensive and not necessarily of good quality. We ordered lunch on the first day and it took over an hour to deliver a couple of hamburgers which were cold and tasteless. The buffet dinner was also expensive but we didn't try it and opted for sampling the many restaurants on the main road nearby. These were all excellent and reasonably priced.  I would recommend staying at this resort because it is beautiful and clean, but explore outside for any activities like cooking classes, snorkeling tours or dining.
reviews.positives: Our beach house was right on the ocean, staff were very friendly, easy to walk to city center and dining

reviews.title: Relaxing resort right next to the ocean
reviews.text: Very enjoyable, particularly with the bungalows just metres from the pounding sea.  The resort gardens are cool and pleasant, with many coconut palms framing ocean views from the bungalow balcony.  Good air con and a georgous pool.  Breakfast could be better but the fruit was nice.  Room service and good very average.  Great to chill out and the town, a short walk.
reviews.positives: Sea and pool, the room, the balcony

reviews.title: Очень зелёный и удобно расположенный отель.
reviews.positives:
Отдыхали в конце февраля 2024г. Отель выбирал так как был уже здесь в 2011 году, но тогда он был очень дорогой и это была 5*. Сейчас это 4*. Находится в 1.5 км от ночного рынка. Двухэтажный корпус с ресепшн снесли, но на фото он есть. Вместо него газон засадили. Ресепшн новый построили и ресторан тоже новый. В настоящее время используется только половина отеля. Вторая часть законсервирована. Видимо сказалась пандемия. Вообще народа мало, видимо по причине отсутствие прямого сообщения с Россией. Русских мало, было 3-4 семьи. Есть казахи, так как оттуда летают. Цены дешевле чем до пандемии. Видимо конкуренция из за отсутствия туристов. На первый взгляд заселение отелей в среднем 20-30 процентов. 
Когда покупал, брал с большой скидкой видимо помому, что новый год закончился и мест в отеле было очень много. Пдатите в долгах, так как если в долларах, то курс в отелях пересчёта не выгодный. Менять либо а аэропорту Хошимина после границы справа или на Фукоке в магазине жемчуга недалеко от ночного рынка (там самый выгодный курс: новые доллары - 24800, старые - 24000). Отель утопает в зелени, пальмы, вечером все дорожки подсвечены светящейся лентой. Мы жили в бунгало сразу на берегу. На трассе свои лежаки, ванна с душем прям на трассе. Очень удобно, спустился, искупался и к себе на террасу. Море конечно не такое прозрачное как на Пляже Он-ланг, но оно тут всегда такое было. Вода теплая. Каждый день +30. Дождей не было, сейчас не сезон!   Завтраки отличные, есть всё что душе угодно! Повар у них нормальный.
reviews.negatives: Обстановка в номере старая, всё из дерева, паркет деревянный. Раньше так делали в пятерках. Но годы берут своё - дерево  подгнивает,  нужна реновация. А в остальном если не придираться за 650 долларов за 7 дней за двоих вилла на берегу с собственным пляжем очень нормально!

reviews.title: Good hotel let down by mostly unfriendly staff
reviews.text: This is one of the best hotels on the island but unfortunately it is let down by the attitude of most of the staff which is unfriendly and unhappy. The one exception to that was the restaurant manager who was very helpful and smiling the evening we ate there. The hotel has a lot of facilities including a spa that has a sauna and steam room but you have to pay for these on top of your room charge which I didn't like. They also close the spa very early so you are out of luck if you want to relax in the spa in the evening. The room was a very good standard and the hotel was clean and well maintained. The food was good but not remarkable. Overall I do not feel you get the special treatment that you would expect when staying at this level of hotel and so I can't recommend it.
reviews.positives: Facilities, location and room

The hotel provided free beach activities such as kayaking, fishings, etc.  It's an old hotel albeit some remodeling were done recently (not high quality and workmanship). We booked a 2-room beach front bungalow with ocean view, however the view was not much of an ocean view as it was blocked by the palm trees and looking over the beach with concrete barriers. The free breakfast is very good with many options. We walked to the night market for diner every nights. Even with the agoda discount rate, we think this hotel is over priced.

Мы жили 8 дней  в бунгало с видом на море, просто шикарный вид, пляж хороший, еда на завтраке тоже отличная, чисто не только в номерах, но в районе гостиницы, покушать можно как и в гостинице так и ресторанах на далеко от гостиницы, местоположение очень хорошее. Я очень хочу поблагодарить персонал, который всегда готов помочь в любых ситуациях, персонал очень приятный и отзывчивый.

В целом за неделю проживания с семьей на первой линии в это время за 1300$(сняли типа 2 бунгало- в реальности один домик, в нем два номера и есть смежная дверь), лучше не придумать. Что то подобное начиналось от 2500$ и по отзывам точно не лучше чем здесь. В целом острову надо время освежиться и взбодриться после пандемии( это касается всех отелей, либо плати в среднем 3000$ за неделю)

På 10-15 min promenad når man staden och restauranger och äffärer finns direkt ute på gata.
reviews.negatives: Området är lite slitet men charmigt. Sängar och kuddar behöver uppdateras.

Also no pool for young kids. The best part is the sunset restaurant which is nice and tropical like.
reviews.positives: Great compound & nice beach restaurant

reviews.title: A mixed Bag
reviews.text:
Saigon Phu Quoc is a lovely hotel with a great pool and nice beach front. The service is good and it has two restaurants and is walking distance to town. Plus it has a great bar and BBQ area on the beach. However it sadly lets it’s self down as the rooms are quite dated, the food isn’t the best and it’s the only water front along Long beach that has a couple of concrete steps into the water instead of a natural sloping beach. 
But my only real complaint is the beach sporting equipment was so old and poorly maintained that they were dangerous.
reviews.positives: Location on the beach was wonderful
reviews.negatives: Beach equipment so old and rusted they were dangerous

The service of the staff on the Hotel was great and very help full.

reviews.negatives: Lite hårda kuddar. Det var lite dött på kvällen . Man kunde kanske ha lite puffar nedanför restaurangen där man kunde sitta och ta en drink och njuta av den ljumma kvällsvinden😀

Wspaniała lokalizacja nad samym morzem. Domek przy plaży po prostu WOW. Taras z bezpośrednim zejściem na plażę. Wanna na tarasie cudowna. Bardzo różnorodne śniadania z dużym wyborem. Obsługa przemiła. Basen obok restauracji. Personel codziennie dbał o najmniejszy szczegół. Woda w morzu cieplutka. Huśtawka na palmie na plaży jeśli ktoś che sobie zrobić super instagramowe zdjęcia. Leżaki na tarasie. Do centrum miasta spokojnym spacerkiem 15 minut.
Jeśli wrócę na Phu Quoc to tylko tam!

reviews.response:
Dear Ms CHAN KIM YU EMMA,

On behalf of management, thank you too much for your stay at Sai Gon Phu Quoc resort & Spa from October 28 to November 01, 2019.

We are thankful to you for good comment on breakfast, and clean room… Besides, we do apologize  for air-conditioning that caused much inconvenience  to you. What a pity, we didn’t have this request during your stay. For BBQ restaurant, our manager take note this matter. For mosquito, we have mosquito lotion in the room and  the net if guest request. Beside that, we have the pest control service by spraying unharmful chemical one time/month  in the resort’s precinct. Thanks again for your stay. We hope to serve your family again at our resort with some differences on next visit.


Best Regards,
Nguyen Ngoc Linh
Front Office Manager

reviews.title: Above average

Snídaně: jedna z nejslabších snídaní (vyzkoušeli jsme více hotelů na Phu Quoc). Ovoce pouze 2-3 druhy, sladké pečivo pouze 2 druhy domácí buchty a lívance, ostatní více méně standard. Jak jsme měli hotel vizuálně za nádherný, toto mu výrazně ubralo body.

reviews.title: Beach Location
reviews.text: Great location on the beach, waking up at 05.00am each morning to join the locals swimming before it gets too hot during the day. Room was comfortable, King size bed was hard but surprisingly very comfortable. You can enjoy sunsets every evening and take some amazing photos. Breakfast was sufficient and I was always looked after by Phuong with a friendly smile with her morning greetings.
reviews.response:

Nguyen Ngoc Linh
Front Office Manager

reviews.title: Good, But Some Problems
reviews.text: I enjoyed my time in Saigon Phu Quoc; the beach and pool was nice, and the room was clean. The front desk employees were also kind. However, we encountered a problem when checking out. We were told to pay for a soda although we did not touch anything from the mini bar (fridge) and so we had to pay extra for something we didn't drink. Paying for it wasn't a problem but the person whom checked our room was being dishonest about it and that was what irked me. My advice for future travelers is to take a picture of the mini bar before touching anything and before checking out.

reviews.title: Good place, bad food.
reviews.text:
We got our room for a good price and were upgraded for free upon arrival. A nice large room with a huge bed and good facilities (coffee/tea/minibar). Large patio doors opened to a balcony with beach view. Happy.
 Food at the poolside restaurant was very bad, and not cheap. Breakfast was standard for Asia. Staff were generally friendly and helpful. Reception staff were very good. The beach front area was kept clear of litter by groundsmen and a small bar meant we could order a cocktail and relax on a lounger. Bliss. Kayaks also free to use.  Overall, good value through Agoda, but not 'special'.

reviews.title: Nice hotel
reviews.text:
Other than the staff service in the restaurants the hotel was very nice.  Nice beach and pool.

The staff at breakfast did not seem to enjoy their jobs and when asked if they could clean the table so we could sit down they did so grudgingly.

We ate dinner at the restaurant by the pool. They had a buffet every night at this restaurant and we asked if we could get a la carte as we cannot eat that much food.  They said yes, however they were not happy about it and one night the service was so bad we got our own drinks at the bar and brought them to the table.  When we asked if anyone was serving we were told she was eating.  Hmmmm, sorry we were interrupting your dinner.   We finished our drink and I went back to the bar to get a second and brought them back to our table.  Once she finished her dinner she finally decided she 
would serve us.  Saved ourselves a tip that night!

Waking up, hearing the waves and seeing the clear blue sky and water was excellent. The beach was clean, the chairs relaxing and even fast internet everywhere. The breakfast was very simple, the staff oke and the overall resort a bit older. It is a good resort but it uses its past glory to still asks high prices. Get a nice bungalow, then it works. Otherwise there are newer resorts for the same price.

reviews.title: Idyllic resort with spacious,comfortable rooms
reviews.text: The hotel was located in a convenient part of the town and had great access to a fine white sand, clean beach. The rooms were large, clean and comforatable though the bathrooms were a little dated. The pool is a good size with enough lounges, towels, equipment etc for everyone. Staff were always friendly and competent. Food at the resort was disappointing and relatively expensive compared to other local fare. However, there were many alternative options within walking distance or a short taxi ride away. The buffet breakfast was good, with a lot of options for all tastes and cultures. The setting of the hotel was delightful with a lot of trees and stunning views of the beach.

Choice of lazing by the pool or lazing by the beach. Pool clean and wait staff attentive.
Lovely gardens to wander around and the restaurant served delicious food to cater to all tastes.
I was not inclined to swim in the sea, others obviously not as finicky as me, but there was too much rubbish floating in and myriad baby squid - felt like swimming in tapioca. 
Extra bed in the room very hard!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
We stayed at Saigon Phu Quoc Resort for 9 nights over the Christmas and New Year period 2025, and based on the high rating, we had significant expectations which, unfortunately, were not met. The resort is visibly tired and does not live up to its 8.6 score on Booking.com. 

The most immediate let down was the pool area, as tiles were broken and discoloured, weeds were growing through the paving, and the pool water itself had an unclean, milky appearance. The beach bar was never properly stocked, requiring a walk to the main bar for even a simple drink. 

On a positive note, the rooms were clean, spacious, and well-maintained, the best part of our stay. Breakfast was well laid out but the hot food was consistently lukewarm or cold. We must commend the staff, who were always polite and helpful despite the resort's clear operational shortcomings. 

A major contrast and lifesaver for us was discovering the Salinda Resort for a day visit. It was exceptional and highlighted just how much Saigon Phu Quoc needs a serious overhaul to compete. 

Advice for Phu Quoc Visitors:

If you want a lovely stay, we highly recommend staying at the Salinda Resort. For great evenings, visit the Sunset Beach Bar and Versailles Beach Bar. Khem Beach is stunning with lovely restaurants. At night, visit Grand World in the north (after 7pm) to see the amazing Venice-style lit-up buildings with plenty of dining options. A final tip: do not bring old-series $100 USD notes, as exchanges will only accept new ones.

Bottom Line: This resort is resting on past laurels. For a true premium experience on Phu Quoc, you will need to look elsewhere.

reviews.title: Some nice features but overall: meh
reviews.text:
We had already lowered our expectations of this hotel based on previous reviews. We knew the hotel was older and needed some updates. For the price we paid, we can't really complain, but I will share these details.
PROS: The grounds and the layout of the hotel are great. Sunsets from the beach were spectacular! The landscaping is lovely and well-kept. Our rooms were adequate, spacious, clean, and the balcony was great. The pool is clean and a decent size. The Wifi was good too.
CONS: The beach is narrow, even at low tide, and there's trash in it, even with trash removal happening regularly. My biggest complaint was the lack of service and the food. The breakfast had some decent options but for it being a holiday, the staff seemed woefully unprepared. The coffee was sludge (how is this even possible in Vietnam?!). But the tipping point for us was the fact that fridge at the main bar was broken and no one seemed to think that was a problem. We were asked if warm beer and soda was OK. Nope, not so much. And we were told no cocktails, even though there was liquor and mixers on the shelves. There was zero service at the pool. Such a missed opportunity for the hotel! We got a bucket of ice and brought our own cold beers—and lunch. We also had to ask for pool towels as they'd run out and no one noticed. It's the little things that make a stay memorable and they were definitely missing from this hotel. If you want a decent but older hotel in a good location, this is an OK choice. Just don't expect much in the way of service. (For lunch, the Tram Tram banh mi stand up the street can't be beat!! And you can walk to Banana Garden for an exceptional breakfast too.)

The bathroom had a shower Curtain. I hat that. And no matter how hard we tried, the bathroom was flooded after every single Shower. So I really didn’t like that.

reviews.title: many facilities and great location
reviews.text:
our stay at saigon phu quoc resort was very relaxing. the staff were very friendly and professional. we stayed in a panorama room which is set right at the back of the resort however our room still managed a view of the ocean. 

the room was very spacious and very clean. the resort is cleary a few years old and the bathroom could do with a renovation as the shower, although clean, was old and the grout a bit grotty. we also had an issue with a blocked drain so the shower kept filling up when we were showering. other than that minor negative everything else was great. 

the resort has many recreational activities from golf to karaoke. all activities are free of charge which is great. you can also get tennis or golf lessons if you want which i think is a nice touch.
the resort is located right on the beach and only about a 10 minute walk to the town centre and night market. we ate at the hotel one night only and the food was good and ok priced. breakfast had many options, vietnamese and western style.

i really liked how the transfer to/from the airport was included in the price. they tell you what time you should check out when you are leaving and the time the bus will take you to the airport. 

i would recommend this resort to people.
reviews.positives: location, facilities, service, right on the beach

reviews.title: We loved the location and our garden villa. It's a great place to relax, right on the beach.
reviews.positives: The resort is perfectly located, right on the beach which is beautiful and a short walk to excellent seafood restuarants. The staff were most accommodating and the check-in and check-out was easy. The breakfast was brilliant and the options at the bar and restaurant were very good. The pool was fantastic and towels were provided. The size of the room was great, and the bed very comfortable. The bathroom was also large and well appointed.
reviews.negatives: The place needs a general facelift especially around the pool and some of the older accommodations. The beachfront villas were excellently presented. The brick surrounds of the pool were uneven and a potential trip hazard.

reviews.title: Average hotel, but great pool and beach front
reviews.text: Hotel was a little old and not too well maintained.  However, the buffet breakfast was great, beautiful pool and deck chairs and the location was very good.  Overall, nice place but a little overpriced.
reviews.positives: Nice pool and very cool beach front

reviews.title: Excellent location and older but good resort
reviews.positives: excellent location, great pool, and good variety at breakfast

reviews.title: Nice hotel, good location
reviews.text: The staff were friendly. Service at the pool side bar and reception were a bit slow at times but overall nothing to complain about. The rooms were clean and we had an excellent view. The bbq was good but not amazing. Perfect hotel for families with kids.
reviews.positives: Great beach, quite location

reviews.title: Nice resort on beach close to town
reviews.positives: Beachside villas overlooking beach.  Staff were friendly and very helpful.  Clean and comfortable villa. Great view of sunset every evening.  Good breakfast with wide range of choices.  Close to wide range of restaurants.
reviews.negatives: Nothing.  Great stay
